name: aurora-ai-test-results
title: Aurora AI Test Results
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native test results parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/test-results.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`.
